svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net"> <diagram name="GloveSynth Architecture" id="0"> <mxGraphModel dx="1334" dy="917" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1100" pageHeight="850" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="stm32" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="STM32 Nucleo-U545RE
Main Controller" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="200" x="420" y="260" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="input" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;" value="Input Subsystem
- Finger Buttons
- MPU6050 IMU
(GPIO + I2C)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="140" width="220" x="120" y="120" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="output" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;" value="Output Subsystem
- Passive Buzzer (PWM)
- Status LEDs" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="120" width="220" x="760" y="140" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="storage" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;" value="Storage Subsystem
- microSD Card
(SPI Interface)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="220" x="760" y="360" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e1" edge="1" parent="1" source="input" style="endArrow=block;html=1;" target="stm32"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e2" edge="1" parent="1" source="stm32" style="endArrow=block;html=1;" target="output"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e3" edge="1" parent="1" source="stm32" style="endArrow=block;html=1;" target="storage"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
